SVG cards committed here so the profile README loads images from `raw.githubusercontent.com` (reliable with GitHub Camo).  
Regenerated by **Actions → Sync readme cards** or daily cron (`readme-cards.yml`).  
Public `github-readme-stats.vercel.app` is often **503 / paused**; the workflow uses mirror **`github-readme-stats-eight-theta.vercel.app`**.  
Trophy cards use **`github-profile-trophy-beta.vercel.app`** (main `github-profile-trophy.vercel.app` often returns **402**).
